change.title: Argus posting projection smoke

context.summary: GitHub PR fixture for caller-owned posting policy.
acceptance: Caller owns activation gates, stale-head suppression, marker dedupe, caps, and posting.
Cerberus emits a validated review artifact and inline-comment projection only.
